holdings.infoBox: QINT is an equity ETF with a total of 377 individual holdings. The top holdings are LVMH Moët Hennessy - Louis Vuitton, Société Européenne stock at 1.67%, ASML Holding at 1.45%, Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria at 1.28%, Sanofi at 1.25%, and DENSO at 1.15%.

overview.description: The American Century Quality Diversified International ETF (QINT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap global stocks, selected and weighted by value and growth factors. It excludes US firms and lower quality stocks. QINT was launched on Sep 10, 2018 and is issued by American Century Investments.
